name: mab-harness
description: Drive structured software-or-design work through a plan → implement → evaluate loop with a skeptical subagent gate. Distills best practices from Anthropic's harness-design and effective-harnesses posts, OpenAI's Codex harness-engineering essay, and Huntley's Ralph Wiggum technique into a Claude-Code-native skill. No Python, no per-project config; state lives in one JSON per work item.
